message:
feat(connectors): migrate 20 data/storage/analytics/finance connectors to typed OperationInfo

Migrated operations_info() from raw json!([...]) to typed Vec<OperationInfo>
for: algolia, amplitude, annas-archive, arxiv, bigquery, bitwarden,
duckdb, elasticsearch, hubspot, metabase, mixpanel, mongodb, 1password,
posthog, retool, salesforce, segment, semanticscholar, snowflake, spotify.

Each connector now exposes input_schema, output_schema, and AgentHint
(when_to_use, examples, common_mistakes) at runtime via introspection,
matching the data already in manifest.toml.

All connectors pass clippy and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
